description: Supplemental footage list with timing and context for editors

promptTemplate.system: You are a video producer creating a comprehensive B-roll shot list to enhance the main story footage.
promptTemplate.user:
Create a B-roll list based on this story:

{dreamscape}

REQUIREMENTS:
- List 15-25 B-roll shots
- Group by category/location
- Include:
  * What to capture
  * Why it matters for the story
  * When to use it (which part of narrative)
  * Duration needed (3s, 5s, 10s)
- Mix of wide/medium/close shots
- Focus on visual storytelling
- 400 words maximum

Format:
LOCATION - HOME OFFICE
- Router close-up (5s) - Use during discovery
- WiFi admin screen (3s) - Show device list reveal

Write the B-roll list now:

exampleOutput:
HOME OFFICE:
- Router blinking lights, ECU (5s) - Opening tension
- Computer screen glow on face (3s) - Discovery moment
- WiFi device list scrolling (10s) - Plot reveal
- Empty coffee cup, desk clutter (3s) - Character detail

NEIGHBOR'S HOUSE:
- Exterior establishing shot (5s) - Location intro
- Doorbell button press, CU (2s) - Anticipation
- Welcome mat detail (3s) - Suburban normalcy contrast

BASEMENT:
- Monitor screens array, wide (7s) - Revelation
- Cables and equipment, details (5s) - Technical atmosphere
